images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese idol, radiating a fresh and innocent vibe amidst a surreal setting. Captured in a high-angle selfie, her large expressive eyes widen in a genuinely scared or shocked expression, as if caught off guard by the sudden glare. The scene is illuminated by the sharp, glittering reflections of a disco ball, casting dynamic bright spots across the background and her face, creating a high contrast and sharp color grade without heavy shadows. The background blurs into a bokeh of city lights, shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
